title: Brand New Store Opening Poster AI
sourceTitle: Brand New Store Opening Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical premium new-store opening poster for MELLOW CUP, designed as a polished commercial launch announcement with specific poster mood variant with readable visual details. Subject: A complete high-quality 3D storefront or retail space visual clearly displays MELLOW CUP, with lifestyle-brand props, counter, display shelves, packaging, signage, and category-matched product details. Scene: Cream-white, warm beige, light wood, soft grey, or other restrained low-saturation brand environment; the visual feels like a real neighborhood retail launch rather than a cheap sale ad. Composition: Fixed vertical poster hierarchy: top brand logo or MELLOW CUP, small corner copy, large OPENING SOON, smaller WEST LAKE STORE, central store-space render, date badge JUN 28, and clean bottom information area. Signature Elements: Preserved brand new store opening poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium new-store commercial poster with minimalist luxury layout, light magazine feeling, refined 3D architectural visualization, realistic materials, social-media-ready brand polish, and strong but calm opening atmosphere. Color Palette: Cream, beige, warm grey, light wood, soft khaki, and restrained accent colors matched to specific poster mood variant with readable visual details; low saturation, clean, unified, and not overly bright. Lighting: Warm soft commercial interior lighting with gentle glow from signage, believable shadows, realistic glass or acrylic reflections, and polished architectural visualization depth. Materials: Light wood grain, stone, microcement, glass, metal, acrylic, warm light strips, paper texture, packaging surfaces, and realistic storefront construction detail. Typography: MELLOW CUP, OPENING SOON, WEST LAKE STORE, and JUN 28 appear as clear readable poster text with premium serif or modern bold sans-serif styling and disciplined spacing. Restrictions: Keep one single poster, not a collage;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
